user_feedback: ok, can you make it so that the monster spawns in only when you are on top of the glowing orb things, and I want the animation of my sword to be a side swipe, the sword should be mvoing parallel with the floor in the half circle swipe, I also want to be able to move faster and I want to dodge the same direction that I am moving
analysis:
- Issue identified: 
  1. Monster needs to spawn only when player collects a track (not at game start)
  2. Sword animation needs to be horizontal (Y-axis rotation) instead of vertical
  3. Player movement speed needs to be increased
  4. Dodge should move in the direction of player's current velocity, not facing direction
  
- Files affected: 
  1. globals.js - Player speed configuration
  2. entities.js - Player dodge logic, sword animation, Track collection spawning
  3. game.js - Monster initialization logic
  
- Changes needed:
  1. Increase player speed/acceleration values in GAME_CONFIG
  2. Change sword swing from Z-axis to Y-axis rotation for horizontal swipe
  3. Modify dodge to use velocity direction instead of rotation
  4. Remove monster creation from setupHunt() and spawn it when first track is collected
